zh.lifeSummary: 當Ide de Lorraine於大約1030年出生在比利時盧布格布易隆時，她的父親Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie35歲，母親Doda von Henneberg29歲。她於1058年1月3日與Eustache II de Boulogne在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1113年8月13日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅享年84歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ide de Lorraine于大约1030年出生在比利时盧布格布易隆时，她的父亲Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie35岁，母亲Doda von Henneberg29岁。她于1058年1月3日与Eustache II de Boulogne在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1113年8月13日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅享年84岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Ide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Origin uncertain: possibly connected with Old Irish ítu ‘thirst’. It was borne by a 6th-century saint who founded a convent in Limerick.

en.lifeSummary: When Ide de Lorraine was born about 1030, in Bouillon, Luxembourg, Belgium, her father, Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie, was 35 and her mother, Doda von Henneberg, was 29. She married Eustache II de Boulogne on 3 January 1058, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 13 August 1113, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 84, and was buried in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ide de Lorraine est née environ 1030, à Bouillon, Luxembourg, Belgique, son père, Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Doda von Henneberg, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Eustache II de Boulogne le 3 janvier 1058, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 août 1113, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ide de Lorraine um 1030 in Bouillon, Luxemburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie 35 und ihre Mutter Doda von Henneberg 29. Sie hat am 3. Januar 1058 in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Eustache II de Boulogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. August 1113 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ide de Lorraine è nata il circa 1030 nel Bouillon, Lussemburgo, Belgio, sua padre, Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Doda von Henneberg, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Eustache II de Boulogne il 3 gennaio 1058, nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 agosto 1113, nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ide de Lorraineが約1030年にベルギールクセンボウルグボウイロンで生まれた時，父Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingieは35歳，母Doda von Hennebergは29歳であった。1058年1月3日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーでEustache II de Boulogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1113年8月13日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーで84歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ide de Lorraine(이)가 대략 1030년 벨기에 루세보우르그 부이런에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Doda von Henneberg(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1058년 1월 3일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 Eustache II de Boulogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1113년 8월 13일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ide de Lorraine nasceu aproximadamente 1030, em Bouillon, Luxemburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Doda von Henneberg, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Eustache II de Boulogne em 3 de janeiro de 1058, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de agosto de 1113, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ide de Lorraine родилась около 1030 г. в местности боуиллон, луксембург, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Doda von Henneberg, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eustache II de Boulogne 3 января 1058 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 августа 1113 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ide de Lorraine nació aproximadamente 1030, en Bouillon, Luxemburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Doda von Henneberg, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Eustache II de Boulogne el 3 de enero de 1058, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de agosto de 1113, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
